description:
Box Array Mesh is a component that is generated by brush tools and can be a cloud of boxes with points, sizes, and rotations.

Note: ``Points``, ``Sizes``, ``Rotations``, ``Colors``, and ``UV_Scales`` arrays must be the same length for this component to work.

fields.Points: List of positions that there should be boxes
fields.Sizes: List of sizes for each box.
fields.Rotations: List of rotations for each box.
fields.Colors: List of colors for each box.
fields.ColorsProfile: __TPL__. However, this is for every box in the array.
fields.UV_Scales: List of UV scales for each box, scaling the material surface detail bigger or smaller.

usage: Use a brush tool from ``ResoniteEssentials/Tools/Brushes/Box Brushes`` and draw to make one of these with values already initialized.
